leaf.title: Assert max_files floor outcome for no-tests Auto-OK leaves
leaf.content:
The wave review confirmed the new floor test never asserts the final max_files of the requires_tests=False Auto-OK leaf, so the floor's non-applicability is unverified.

Files: agents/coding_pipeline/tests/test_architect.py

Acceptance criteria:
- test asserts the exact max_files value for a requires_tests=False Auto-OK leaf after _apply_conservative_tags
- existing floor tests still pass unchanged

Test expectations: one focused assertion added to the existing floor test module
